2603.28762.title: On-the-fly Repulsion in the Contextual Space for Rich Diversity in Diffusion Transformers
2603.28762.paper_summary: Modern Text-to-Image (T2I) diffusion models have achieved remarkable semantic alignment, yet they often suffer from a significant lack of variety, converging on a narrow set of visual solutions for any given prompt. This typicality bias presents a challenge for creative applications that require a wide range of generative outcomes. We identify a fundamental trade-off in current approaches to diversity: modifying model inputs requires costly optimization to incorporate feedback from the generative path. In contrast, acting on spatially-committed intermediate latents tends to disrupt the forming visual structure, leading to artifacts. In this work, we propose to apply repulsion in the Contextual Space as a novel framework for achieving rich diversity in Diffusion Transformers. By intervening in the multimodal attention channels, we apply on-the-fly repulsion during the transformer's forward pass, injecting the intervention between blocks where text conditioning is enriched with emergent image structure. This allows for redirecting the guidance trajectory after it is structurally informed but before the composition is fixed. Our results demonstrate that repulsion in the Contextual Space produces significantly richer diversity without sacrificing visual fidelity or semantic adherence. Furthermore, our method is uniquely efficient, imposing a small computational overhead while remaining effective even in modern "Turbo" and distilled models where traditional trajectory-based interventions typically fail.
2603.28762.paper_summary_zh: 現代的文本到圖像 (T2I) 擴散模型已達到顯著的語義對齊，然而它們往往缺乏多樣性，對於任何給定的提示，通常收斂於一組狹窄的視覺解決方案。這種典型性偏見對於需要廣泛生成結果的創意應用構成挑戰。我們識別出當前多樣性方法中的一個基本權衡：修改模型輸入需要昂貴的優化，以納入來自生成路徑的反饋。相對而言，作用於空間上已承諾的中間潛在變量往往會破壞正在形成的視覺結構，導致工件。在這項工作中，我們提出在上下文空間中應用排斥作為實現擴散Transformer中豐富多樣性的創新框架。通過干預多模態注意通道，我們在Transformer的前向傳遞過程中即時應用排斥，將干預注入文本條件與新興圖像結構豐富的區塊之間。這使得在結構上獲得信息後但在組合固定之前重新導向指導軌跡成為可能。我們的結果表明，上下文空間中的排斥在不犧牲視覺真實性或語義遵循的情況下，產生了顯著更豐富的多樣性。此外，我們的方法獨特地高效，施加了小的計算開銷，同時在現代“Turbo”和精簡模型中仍然有效，而傳統的基於軌跡的干預通常失敗。
2603.28762.author: Omer Dahary et.al.
2603.28762.authors: Omer Dahary, Benaya Koren, Daniel Garibi, Daniel Cohen-Or
